spec.name: The Waiting Room
spec.description: You are standing in a very large room with a high ceiling and there are a few people waiting here to see the Emperor on urgent matters. The master scheduler tells you to have a seat and sends a page to inform the his highness of your arrival. There are large doors to the east and west and an exit leads south to the foyer.

east.description: There is a sign on the door that says: MUNICIPAL COURT OF ROME. It appears to be open.

south.description: The foyer is directly to the south.

west.description: There is a large door to the west.
